prompt:
Ultra-photorealistic IMAX-quality luxury fashion editorial collage portrait, square 1:1 composition, structured as an elegant multi-frame floral-petal layout with soft petal-shaped and oval cutout panels radiating outward from a central circular beauty portrait — one beautiful young woman depicted across all frames in varied couture looks, consistent graceful facial features throughout: expressive almond eyes, sculpted brows, soft full lips, sleek pulled-back updo, luminous refined complexion, calm and confident editorial presence
Central frame: intimate glamour close-up, delicate fine jewelry earrings, flawless soft-glam makeup, direct gaze, cinematic studio lighting with gentle facial highlights
Surrounding frames each featuring a distinct couture silhouette and pose — all designed in a rich dark palette: obsidian black, deep charcoal, midnight navy, dark espresso brown, deep burgundy, dark emerald — rendered in sculptural strapless gowns, dramatic one-shoulder silhouettes, sheer heavily-embellished eveningwear, fluid draped column dresses, tailored structured-sleeve jumpsuits, ruffled couture ballgowns — each outfit showing different texture details: silk charmeuse, duchess satin, organza overlays, hand-beaded mesh, velvet, metallic jacquard
Posing across frames: seated editorial lean, standing three-quarter turn, over-the-shoulder glance, flowing movement pose, close cropped fashion detail — cohesive styling language across all panels, unified by sleek hair and consistent beauty look
Background: soft warm beige-cream luxury art paper texture, layered dimensional petal and leaf shapes, subtle drop shadows between frames, clean white negative space, refined editorial grid structure
Lighting: soft wraparound cinematic studio glow, gentle specular highlights on skin and fabric surfaces, feathered rim light, deep shadow contrast on dark garments, HDR balanced exposure
Color grade: creamy neutral background tones sharply contrasted against deep saturated couture colors, luminous warm skin highlights, premium magazine color temperature, cinematic shadow depth
Render quality: 8K photorealistic production, ultra-fine fabric texture detail, masterpiece editorial composition, global illumination, premium fashion portrait optics, HDR rendering
